caption: A person wearing a black t-shirt, black pants, and white sneakers walks past a red pillar and a white bus labeled "Real Madrid" toward a stadium. Two men in suits stand nearby. The scene then shifts to a wide view of a soccer stadium with red seats and a green field. The word "GRANADA" is visible in large white letters across the red seating area. A white Real Madrid logo is positioned in the upper right corner of the frame. In the subsequent views, several people in athletic gear and suits are scattered across the grass, and a sign reading "PULEVA" is visible on the right side of the stands. The lighting suggests late afternoon or early evening, with stadium floodlights illuminated against a blue sky with scattered clouds.
